headline: Salesforce posts record Q1 FY27: revenue $11.13B (+13%), Agentforce ARR $1.2B (+205%), $25B accelerated buyback
whyItMatters: Combined Agentforce + Data 360 ARR ~$3.4B (+200%+ YoY) validates the AI-monetization thesis, while a $25B ASR shrinks the share count as core growth normalizes toward ~11%.

headline: Record Q4 FY26; $50B buyback authorization (largest ever) and FY27 revenue guide $45.8-46.2B
whyItMatters: The $50B repurchase program (anchored by a $25B ASR) plus a 5.8% dividend increase mark a decisive capital-return pivot; FY27 guide of +10-11% and RPO $72.4B (+14%) frame the durable-growth case for the multiple.

headline: Record Q3 FY26; FY26 guide raised, Agentforce + Data 360 ARR near $1.4B (+114% YoY)
whyItMatters: Revenue $10.3B (+9%) at 35.5% non-GAAP op margin with FCF +22% kept the margin/cash story intact while triple-digit AI-product ARR growth gave the first hard proof Agentforce converts to recurring revenue.

headline: Salesforce completes ~$8B acquisition of Informatica
whyItMatters: Bolts enterprise data integration, governance and MDM onto the platform — the data backbone Agentforce needs — adding ~$1.1B Informatica Cloud ARR; its largest deal since Slack.

headline: Salesforce expands partnerships with OpenAI and Anthropic; Agentforce coming to ChatGPT
whyItMatters: Embedding Agentforce 360 into ChatGPT and naming Claude a preferred model for regulated industries widens distribution and de-risks the model layer — positioning Salesforce as an AI orchestrator rather than a single-LLM bet.

headline: Agentforce 360 launches at Dreamforce 2025; Salesforce declares the 'Agentic Enterprise'
whyItMatters: The rebranded flagship (Agentforce Builder, Agent Script, Voice, Intelligent Context) with 12,000 customers is the centerpiece of the AI re-rating narrative; proof points like Reddit deflecting 46% of support cases anchor the enterprise-ROI pitch.

headline: Benioff confirms ~4,000 customer-support layoffs as Agentforce reduces headcount needs
whyItMatters: Cutting support staff from ~9,000 to ~5,000 ('I need less heads') is both a margin tailwind and the clearest public demonstration of Salesforce eating its own AI — while raising the execution/optics risk of automating a core customer-facing function.

headline: Salesforce signs definitive agreement to acquire Informatica for ~$8B equity value
whyItMatters: Kicked off Salesforce's return to large-scale M&A after a buyback-focused, activist-pressured stretch — signaling management again sees data infrastructure as strategic enough to spend on rather than only return cash.
